about.about_1:
I'm a passionate Python developer with 5+ years of experience building web applications. 
I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful, and intuitive designs.
about.about_2:
My journey in web development started with a curiosity about how websites work, and it has 
 evolved into a career where I get to build solutions that make a difference. I specialize in 
 modern web technologies and enjoy working on both frontend and backend development.
about.about_3:
When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source 
 projects, or sharing my knowledge with the developer community through blog posts and tutorials.
